gratification.form.description_placehold: Explain in detail the chronology of events, who was involved, when and where the incident took place...
gratification.form.info_text: Each report will be kept confidential and in the event of sufficient evidence will be followed up in the subsequent investigation process. The existence of gratification reporting creates a system of mutual supervision of ethics, behavioral conformity and adherence to work procedures.
gratification.index.case1: Giving free travel tickets to officials or their families for personal use.
gratification.index.case2: Giving gifts or parcels to officials on religious holidays by partners or subordinates.
gratification.index.case3: Gifts or donations at the wedding of an official's child by the official's office partners.
gratification.index.case4: Giving special discounts to officials for purchasing goods from partners.
gratification.index.case5: Giving Hajj pilgrimage fees or costs from partners to officials.
gratification.index.case6: Giving birthday gifts or at other private events from partners.
gratification.index.case7: Giving gifts or souvenirs to officials during work visits.
gratification.index.case8: Giving gifts or money as a thank you for help received.
gratification.index.forbidden_cases_titl: What are some examples of prohibited gratification cases?
gratification.index.prose1: One of the common customs in society is giving tokens of gratitude for services rendered by officers, either in the form of goods or even money. This can become a negative habit and can lead to potential corruption in the future. It is this potential for corruption that the Corruption Crime Act seeks to prevent.
gratification.index.prose2: Therefore, regardless of the value of the gratification you receive, if the gift is reasonably suspected to be related to your position/authority, it should be immediately reported to the Gratification Management Unit for further analysis.
gratification.index.reporting_channels_t: The available reporting channels are as follows.
name: name
Your information will be kept confidenti: Your information will be kept confidential
